metadata.title: [REVIEW] Missing withErrorHandling wrapper violates established API layer pattern

output.implementationNotes:
Task execution completed. Check logs for details.

Final output:
Added `fetchActiveCustomers` to align the customer API exports with the established `withErrorHandling` pattern, delegating to `fetchCustomers` with the `active: true` flag for consistent error handling in `src/api/customers.js`.

Tests: `npm test -- src/api/__tests__/customers.test.js` failed because the test mocks `../fileMaker`, which no longer exists (`Cannot find module '../fileMaker'`).

Next steps:
1) Update/remove the FileMaker mock in `src/api/__tests__/customers.test.js` to match the current API layer.
2) Re-run the customer API test after the mock update.
